description.en: Sell single-serve espresso machines at low or zero margin through Nespresso boutiques, the website, and OEM partners (Krups, De'Longhi, Magimix manufacture under licence). Patented capsule geometry locks each machine to Nespresso capsules. Each machine sold creates a multi-year capsule customer — that's where the model captures value.
description.zh: 通过 Nespresso 精品店、官网、以及 OEM 合作伙伴(Krups、De'Longhi、Magimix 按授权制造)以低利或零利出售单次冲泡咖啡机。专利保护的胶囊接口把每台机器锁定在 Nespresso 胶囊上。每卖出一台机器就锁定一个多年期的胶囊客户 —— 这才是模式真正捕获价值的地方。
